mysite
Table of Contents

Interface IUsuarioRepository

Namespace
Service.Contracts
Assembly
Service.dll

Repository contract for Usuario entities, extending standard CRUD with user-specific permission and lookup operations.

public interface IUsuarioRepository : IGenericRepository<Usuario>
Inherited Members
IGenericRepository<Usuario>.Add(Usuario)
IGenericRepository<Usuario>.Update(Usuario)
IGenericRepository<Usuario>.Remove(Guid)
IGenericRepository<Usuario>.GetById(Guid)
IGenericRepository<Usuario>.GetAll()

Methods

GetByUsername(string)

Finds a user by login name (case-insensitive comparison depends on database collation).

Usuario GetByUsername(string username)

Parameters

username string

The login name to search for.

Returns

Usuario

The matching Usuario, or null if not found.

GetFamiliasByUsuarioId(Guid)

Retrieves the top-level Familia nodes assigned to a user. Each family is fully hydrated (recursive children loaded).

List<Familia> GetFamiliasByUsuarioId(Guid usuarioId)

Parameters

usuarioId Guid

The user to look up.

Returns

List<Familia>

List of assigned families; empty list if none.

GetUsuariosDTO()

Returns all users projected as UsuarioDTO, including their permission trees.

List<UsuarioDTO> GetUsuariosDTO()

Returns

List<UsuarioDTO>

List of user DTOs; empty list if no users exist.

UpdateAccesos(Guid, List<Acceso>)

Replaces the full set of Acceso nodes assigned to a user. The existing permission associations are deleted and re-inserted atomically.

void UpdateAccesos(Guid idUsuario, List<Acceso> accesos)

Parameters

idUsuario Guid

The user whose permissions will be replaced.

accesos List<Acceso>

New list of Acceso roots to assign.
